description: Cross-file: math.ts exports addTwo. calc.ts uses an export-from with the wrong name ('addOne'). DOCUMENTED LIMITATION (probed 2026-05-03): for `export { X } from './path'` the TS LanguageService returns zero code fixes for TS2305 — even though it does for the import-from form. The fix path lives in the mend layer until/unless we add a custom export-from rewriter. consumer.ts imports the correct name directly so the rename has no ripple.
